---

### Downloads

| Flavor | Format | SHA256 |
| - | - | - |
| Play Store (`play`) | [APK](#) | `PLAY_APK_SHA256` |
| Play Store (`play`) | [AAB](#) | `PLAY_AAB_SHA256` |
| F-Droid / Sideload (`foss`) | [APK](#) | `FOSS_APK_SHA256` |

#### Verify a download

```bash
sha256sum "before-its-gone-play-release-X.Y.Z.apk"
```

---

### Which APK should I install?

| You want | Use |
| - | - |
| Install from the Play Store | Play Store flavor (coming soon) |
| F-Droid / IzzyOnDroid | FOSS flavor APK |
| Sideload with Google Services | Play flavor APK |
| Sideload without Google dependencies | FOSS flavor APK |

The FOSS flavor uses ZXing for barcode scanning and has no Google dependencies. Both flavors are otherwise identical in features.

---

### Minimum requirements

- Android 8.0 (API 26) or later
- Camera permission required for barcode scanning
